seo.title: Wholesale Stainless Steel Standoff Halo Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 3.1 | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale fabricated stainless steel halo-lit letters with standoff mount. LEDs arranged to avoid reflection. German-engineered. Trade pricing for sign shops only.

de.title: Großhandel Edelstahl Abstandshalter Halo Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 3.1 | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel fabricated Edelstahl halo-beleuchtet letters with Abstandshalter mount. LEDs arranged to avoid reflection. Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst. Händlerpreise for Schilderwerkstätten only.

data.subtitle:
Fabricated stainless steel letters with precision standoff mounting create a clean, sophisticated halo glow. The EdgeLuxe LP 3.1 features LEDs arranged to eliminate diode reflection on the mounting surface — delivering a smooth, even backlight.

German-engineered precision. UL listed. Wholesale direct to sign shops across the USA and Canada.

de.subtitle:
Fabricated Edelstahl letters with precision Abstandshalter mounting create a clean, sophisticated halo glow. The EdgeLuxe LP 3.1 features LEDs arranged to eliminate diode reflection on the mounting surface — delivering a smooth, even backlight.

Deutsche Ingenieurs-Präzision. UL-zertifiziert. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten across the USA und Kanada.

items.title: Clean Halo Effect
items.description: LEDs specifically arranged to avoid diode reflection on the mounting surface. Creates a smooth, even halo glow behind each letter.

items.title: Standoff Mounting
items.description: Raised off the mounting surface with precision standoff spacers. The gap between letter and wall creates the signature halo illumination.

items.title: UL Listed
items.description: Every illuminated letter set ships with UL listing labels and documentation for fast, compliant permitting.

items.title: Full Customization
items.description: Painted in any PMS color. Options for vinyls or pigmented translucent acrylics for colorful halo effects.

items.title: Multiple Depth Options
items.description: Available in 30mm, 50mm, 80mm, and 100mm depths to match any project scale and desired halo spread.

items.title: Serviceable LEDs
items.description: Unlike sealed block acrylic, fabricated stainless steel construction allows LED modules to be serviced and replaced in the field.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Built to meet and exceed industry standards. Every specification reflects our commitment to quality and longevity. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Stainless steel standoff halo — cross-section detail showing LED placement and standoff spacer

de.heading: Handelsspezifikationen
de.description: Gebaut um Branchenstandards zu erfüllen und zu übertreffen. Jede Spezifikation spiegelt unser Engagement für Qualität und Langlebigkeit wider. Exklusiv zu Großhandelspreisen verfügbar.

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Stainless steel standoff halo letters deliver a refined, architectural aesthetic that elevates any brand. Perfect for premium environments where sophistication is paramount. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.

de.heading: Häufige Anwendungen
de.description: Stainless steel Abstandshalter halo letters deliver a refined, architectural aesthetic that elevates any brand. Perfect for premium environments where sophistication is paramount. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten for all project types.
